zh.lifeSummary: 當William Hulbert於1490年出生在英國維爾爾波爾紹特時，他的父親John Hulbert33歲，母親Jane Hurlbatt30歲。他於1519年與Lady Elizabeth Burleigh of Poulshot在英國維爾爾布拉頓結婚。他去世於1549年在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Hulbert于1490年出生在英国維爾爾波爾紹特时，他的父亲John Hulbert33岁，母亲Jane Hurlbatt30岁。他于1519年与Lady Elizabeth Burleigh of Poulshot在英国維爾爾布拉頓结婚。他去世于1549年在他的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Hulbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Wiltshire and Gloucestershire) and German: from an ancient Germanic personal name, Holbert, Hulbert (Old English Holdbeorht), composed of the elements hold, huld ‘friendly, gracious’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. Old English names in Hold- are rare and late, only Holdburh and Holdfrith (both female) and Holdwine being recorded in independent use.

variants.name: Halbert
meanings: Scottish (mainly Glasgow): probably a variant of Hulbert . Black suggests that the name derives from halberd, halbert, the medieval weapon, but there is no clear evidence for this.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Halberht, composed of the elements hal ‘hidden, mysterious’ and berht ‘bright’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When William Hulbert was born in 1490, in Poulshot, Wiltshire, England, his father, John Hulbert, was 33 and his mother, Jane Hurlbatt, was 30. He married Lady Elizabeth Burleigh of Poulshot in 1519, in Bratton, Wiltshire, England. He died in 1549, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Hulbert est né en 1490, à Poulshot, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, John Hulbert, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Jane Hurlbatt, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Burleigh of Poulshot en 1519, à Bratton, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1549, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Hulbert 1490 in Poulshot, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Hulbert 33 und seine Mutter Jane Hurlbatt 30. Er hat 1519 in Bratton, Wiltshire, England Lady Elizabeth Burleigh of Poulshot geheiratet. Er starb 1549 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Hulbert è nato il nel 1490 nel Poulshot, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, John Hulbert, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Jane Hurlbatt, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Burleigh of Poulshot nel 1519, nel Bratton, Wiltshire, England. Morì nel 1549, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Hulbertが1490年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアポウルショトで生まれた時，父John Hulbertは33歳，母Jane Hurlbattは30歳であった。1519年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアブラットオンでLady Elizabeth Burleigh of Poulshotと結婚した。彼は1549年に故郷で59歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Hulbert(이)가 1490년 영국 윌츠히르 파우쇼트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hulbert(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Hurlbatt(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1519년 영국 윌츠히르 브래턴에서 Lady Elizabeth Burleigh of Poulshot(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1549년 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Hulbert nasceu em 1490, em Poulshot, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Hulbert, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Jane Hurlbatt, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Burleigh of Poulshot em 1519, em Bratton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1549, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Hulbert родился в 1490 г. в местности поулшот, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Hulbert было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Hurlbatt, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Burleigh of Poulshot в 1519 г. в местности браттон, уилцхир, Англия. Он умер в 1549 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Hulbert nació en 1490, en Poulshot, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Hulbert, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Jane Hurlbatt, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Burleigh of Poulshot en 1519, en Bratton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Murió en 1549, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Suffolk, Inglaterra.
